0=No
 1=Yes
 9=Unable to Determine
 ^=Blank(skip pattern)
338 J0400_PAIN_FREQ_CD J0400_PAIN_FREQ_CD J0400 Pain Assessment Interview: Pain Frequency Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the resident's pain or hurting frequency over the last five days. -=Not assessed/no information
1=Almost constantly
2=Frequently
3=Occasionally
4=Rarely
9=Unable to answer
^=Blank (skip pattern) discontinued 09/30/2023
339 J0500A_PAIN_EFCT_SLEEP_CD J0500A_PAIN_EFCT_SLEEP_CD J0500A Pain Assessment
